zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibilia De Bagot於1292年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾巴格也斯 布羅姆利時，她的父親Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley11289歲，母親Hawise Stafford27歲。她於大約1305年與William Sulney在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾巴格也斯 布羅姆利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bagot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Baggett   (see also   Baggott  ), from a pet form of   Bagg   2.

variants.name: Baggett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Norman personal name Bagot, a diminutive of ancient Germanic Bago, from the root bag- ‘to fight’. Compare Bagg 2.

nameMeanings.name: Sibilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emilio, Angelo, Antonio, Rocco, Sal, Salvatore, Silvio.  Spanish Jose, Juan, Zoraida.
Italian (mainly southern): from the medieval female personal name Sibilia, from Old French Sibilie (see Sibley ).

variants.name: Scibelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Gennaro, Filomena, Marco, Paolo, Salvator.
Italian (Campania): patronymic or plural form of a variant of the female personal name   Sibilia   (compare   Scibilia  ).

variants.name: Scibilia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Giuseppe, Rosario, Angelo, Antonio, Carmela, Fabio, Fortunato, Gaspare, Girolamo, Rocco, Sal, Salvatore, Santo.
Italian (Sicily): from a variant of the female personal name   Sibilia  .

en.lifeSummary: When Sibilia De Bagot was born in 1292, in Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley, was 11289 and her mother, Hawise Stafford, was 27. She married William Sulney about 1305, in Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibilia De Bagot est née en 1292, à Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley, avait 11289 ans et sa mère, Hawise Stafford, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William Sulney environ 1305, à Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

Lei sposato William Sulney circa 1305, nel Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibilia De Bagotが1292年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアバゴト'ス ブロムリーで生まれた時，父Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromleyは11289歳，母Hawise Staffordは27歳であった。約1305年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアバゴト'ス ブロムリーでWilliam Sulneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibilia De Bagot(이)가 1292년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 바고트'스 브롬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley(은)는 11289세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Stafford(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 바고트'스 브롬리에서 William Sulney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibilia De Bagot родилась в 1292 г. в местности багот'с бромли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley было 11289 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Stafford, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Sulney около 1305 г. в местности багот'с бромли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
